final:
// // This module implements a synchronous 4-bit down counter with a reset functionality.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (rst == 1'b1) begin
        count <= 4'b0;
    end
    else begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a synchronous 4-bit down counter with a reset functionality.
